title: 🍎❌ No Food Stack
description: A mod for Better Than Adventure that restores food stacking to BTA 7.1 behaviour.
body:
This mod uses a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed only for Better than Adventure, a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3! For more information, join the [BTA Discord Server](https://www.betterthanadventure.net/discord).

---

# 🍎❌ No Food Stack

Like non-stackable food? So do I! No Food Stacking is a a dead-simple mod to revert the new food-stacking mechanics of BTA 7.2 back to how they were in 7.1.

All food items stack to 1, except for the following exceptions, which already stacked in 7.1 / B1.7.3:
- Raw / Cooked Fish: Stacks to 4
- Cookie: Stacks to 8
- Cherry: Stacks to 2

Combine with `/gamerule instantHealing true` for best experience ;)

Happy Gaming!

Made with ❤️ by [Aurailus](https://aurailus.com)
